title: Awaiting Arrival
subtitle: Final moments before birth
description: By week 39, your baby is fully developed and ready for birth. Your body is preparing for labor, and you may notice stronger or more frequent signs indicating that delivery is near.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements continue but feel more restricted due to limited space
You may experience stronger or more regular contractions
Signs of labor such as mucus plug discharge or water breaking may occur
care_tips: Maintain a light and balanced diet
Stay attentive to signs of labor and keep essentials ready

medical_checkups.note: Close monitoring continues as delivery is expected anytime.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Monitors maternal health and readiness for delivery

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor will assess signs of labor and guide you on when to go to the hospital.

important_note: You are at the final stage, and labor can begin at any time.
reassurance: Your baby is fully ready, and you are moments away from meeting them.
medical_disclaimer: Contact your healthcare provider immediately if you notice regular contractions, water breaking, or any unusual symptoms.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels is critical during the final stage before delivery.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be closely monitored during labor preparation.
diabetes.reassurance: Careful management supports a safe delivery.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports your body during labor and immediate recovery.
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be reviewed before delivery.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps prepare your body for childbirth.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure is essential for a safe labor and delivery.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring is crucial at this stage.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports a safer delivery.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support stability during labor and delivery.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored as needed.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain balance during this important time.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As delivery is imminent, managing multiple conditions requires careful and consistent attention.
priority_tips: Keep hospital and emergency plans ready
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady care supports a safe and smooth delivery experience.
